title: Partner Tweaks
description: Adds features for playing with your partner - helpful if they want an easier experience. Integration with ColdSweat and ThirstWasTaken
body:
Set your partner's username in the config file (under world config) to activate this mod for them.

Current features:
- Makes all mobs passive towards the player
- Disables ColdSweat temperature - they will never overheat or freeze!
- Disables ThirstWasTaken thirst - they don't have to worry about drinking water (hard enough to get them to drink water in real life!)


Inspired by the [Co-Op Besties Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/co-op-besties-mod)
